name: Mind Your Manors
description:
You come across the Liliwen Manor, an abandoned mansion which has become home for a pair of ghost maids, who are more than happy to give you a (forceful) makeover.

While out in the rain, you find a strange, lone manor, seemingly completely abandoned. You enter the mansion to hide from the storm, only to discover that there are ghosts inside. Next thing you know, you've been stripped of your physical form, and your spirit has been reshaped into that of a delicate, young lady.

Based on the flash game of the same name that like five people know about.
creator: Frinky
